title: lasianthera javanica
intro: Lasianthera javanica is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae, and is commonly known as Javanese or Java tea tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lasianthera javanica include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, such as coughs, colds, and fever.
